trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 67.5 in the sweet spot bullish momentum zone, confirmed MACD crossover, and price 15% above SMA-20 — strongest technical setup on the screener today and priced to fit remaining cash.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted mildly higher in a low-conviction neutral session — no strong catalyst either way. With one slot and ~$519 in cash available, I put it to work in AXTI, the top-scoring name on today's screener with perfect momentum alignment. Existing holdings look intact; NOK continues to build on its move and shows up again with a score of 90, validating the original entry.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged higher on Friday with the S&P 500 gaining 0.4% and the Nasdaq rising 0.3%, reflecting a calm, low-volume session without major macro catalysts. Investor sentiment remained cautiously optimistic following recent stabilization in trade-policy rhetoric, with rotation visible into tech and semiconductor names. The absence of significant selling pressure kept indices supported near recent highs, though breadth was narrow and volume subdued ahead of the weekend.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週五小幅收高，標普500指數上漲0.4%，納斯達克指數上漲0.3%，反映出市場在缺乏重大宏觀催化劑下維持低波動的溫和格局。在貿易政策言論趨於穩定後，投資者情緒依然審慎樂觀，資金持續向科技及半導體類股輪動。由於成交量清淡，市場未出現明顯拋售壓力，各主要指數在近期高位附近獲得支撐，惟市場廣度偏窄。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that have been trending upward — based on the idea that assets with recent strength tend to keep rising in the short term. Indicators like RSI (above 55 but below 70) and MACD crossovers are used to confirm a stock is in a healthy uptrend without being dangerously overbought. Today's AXTI buy is a textbook momentum trade: price is climbing, volume supports the move, and technical signals all align.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資是指買入近期持續上漲的股票，背後邏輯是：近期表現強勢的資產，在短期內往往仍會延續升勢。投資者通常使用RSI（介於55至70之間）和MACD黃金交叉等技術指標，確認股票正處於健康上升趨勢而非超買狀態。今天買入AXTI正是典型的動能操作：股價攀升，成交量配合，技術訊號全面一致。
